Video.summary: First, a woman wants reimbursement for temporary loan. Then, plaintiff claims unpaid rent and damages.
Video.title: Going Under

Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: A scandalous secret and a polygraph test alter the course of Ceia and Luis' relationship.
Video.title: Stewart vs. Abrew

Video.summary: James, a self-proclaimed "Karma Casanova," must answer for his disrespectful behavior in his relationship with girlfriend Shana.
Video.title: Few vs. Roundtree

Video.summary: A surprise confession changes the course of Johnathan and McKenzie's budding relationship.
Video.title: Renneberg vs. Peterson

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges advise longtime couple Erica and Turk on family and finances.
Video.title: Virgil vs. Virgil Jr.

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: Shawdae and Travis' relationship began with a fight and will end in one, which is why they've asked for the Cutlers' help.
Video.title: McGraw vs. Herrington

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: Destiny and Tavian clash over trust, paternity and financial woes, seeking answers that could make or break their future.
Video.title: Murphy vs. Scott

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: After her boyfriend, Barry, takes a suspicious "business trip" to Miami, Brooke suspects him of cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Daniels vs. White

Video.summary: Ex-lovers Kaniyah and Bleu feud in court over a stolen pair of limited-edition luxury shoes.
Video.title: Whipple vs. Crawley

Video.summary: Accusations of emotional abuse and infidelity bring an Illinois couple to court.
Video.title: Walton vs. Hamilton

Video.summary: A man seeks justice for stolen property and unpaid debt while questioning his future with a distant girlfriend.
Video.title: Whitehurst vs. Briggs

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating and a claim for $695 have Jasmine and Gerrel seeking relationship advice.
Video.title: Doggett vs. Townsend

Video.summary: Harmoni suspects Jarren is cheating and has demanded he take a polygraph to prove his fidelity.
Video.title: Lockhart vs Reid

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: An Atlanta couple struggle to find common ground while dealing with a party lifestyle and a string of broken promises.
Video.title: Ellis vs. McCray

Video.summary: Aspiring social media star Mike sues ex-girlfriend Sidney for nonpayment after she profited from an explicit adult video.
Video.title: Barham vs. Starr

Video.summary: Sarah Oliver ("Bad Girls Club") weighs in on balancing work and love in Will and Jaheim's dramatic relationship.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Duval

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: International twerk coach Christopher brings ex-boyfriend Carl to court after they fail at mixing business and pleasure.
Video.title: Lewis vs. Nuckols

Video.summary: Professional dominatrix Sasha brings her boyfriend, Perrance, to court in hope of spicing up their relationship.
Video.title: Bryer vs. Williams

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: Terrell sues girlfriend Kristy for damages because he suspects she is using him for money.
Video.title: Marrow vs. Coleman

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: A marriage is on the line as accusations of betrayal and overprotection threaten two decades of love and business.
Video.title: Heard vs. Macon

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: A battling couple face off in court over trust, heartbreak and the custody of their beloved rabbit, Oreo.
Video.title: McCoy vs. Norman

Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: A once-thriving relationship teeters on the edge as accusations of infidelity and neglect come to light in court.
Video.title: Osborne vs. Osborne

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: A series of red flags and an old hometown fling have Danielle questioning her boyfriend's loyalty.
Video.title: Parker vs. Riley

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: When Mike’s cheating past still makes Sally feel insecure, she brings him before the Cutlers for guidance.
Video.title: Herrera vs Gallardo

Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: Pablo’s got jokes, but Joanna isn’t laughing. They bring their issues to the Cutlers for help saving their marriage.
Video.title: Aleman vs Aleman

Video.summary: Yoko and Damien seek counsel from the judges on issues including parenting, property damage, and an online shopping addiction.
Video.title: Smith vs. Smith

Video.summary: Andre and Niemah battle in court for parental custody of a beloved pet, Bella.
Video.title: Porch vs. Gillis

Video.summary: Debbie is in for a shocking surprise when she catches her boyfriend, Terrance, sneaking around with her twin sister.
Video.title: Young vs. Goodwin

Video.summary: In an emotional case, Fi and Kee seek to answer questions surrounding sexuality and loyalty with a polygraph test.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Walls

Video.summary: When Queen and Demo are unable to work out their pet issues, the Cutlers help determine how these birds of a feather can stick together.
Video.title: Garrett vs. Williams

Video.summary: After tolerating his gambling and smoking addictions for three-and-a-half years, Deja issues boyfriend Marcus an ultimatum.
Video.title: McKinny vs. Everett

Video.summary: Tandrea sues her ex-girlfriend, Chantay, for $1,000 in pet fees that she failed to pay when they moved into an apartment together.
Video.title: Davis vs. Goodman

Video.summary: Rachel must answer for delaying her nuptials to fiance Blaine after he stuck with her through her prison stint.
Video.title: Cerre vs. Hardy

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Quintin sues his ex-girlfriend, Lashana, for custody of their dogs after she kicks him out of the house.
Video.title: Grice vs. Jackson

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: After a beach getaway raises suspicions, LaBre must convince her husband, Taj, that he is the father of their son.
Video.title: Sewell vs. Sewell

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: Calvin must take a polygraph test after his girlfriend, Johnecia, accuses him of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Tate vs. Glass

Video.summary: Malu sues her girlfriend, L'Mika, because she failed to repay her for a loan and, instead, went on a cruise without her.
Video.title: Mejilla vs. Kargbo

Video.summary: As retribution for his serial cheating, Jaylon sues boyfriend Brian for payment from their online video sharing channel profits.
Video.title: Davis vs. Alben

Video.summary: Newlyweds Eric and Sarah seek the judges' help navigating kids, careers and compatibility.
Video.title: Orive vs. Stark

Video.summary: A shocking twist ending determines the future of Latiana and Wynton's rocky nine-year relationship.
Video.title: Weaver vs. Greene

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom
